net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.impl

Class PassengerImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.impl.BasicNotifierImpl
      • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.BasicEObjectImpl
        • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl
          • org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl.Container
            • net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model.impl.PassengerImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Passenger, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EStructuralFeature.Internal.DynamicValueHolder, org.eclipse.emf.ecore.InternalEObject

    public class PassengerImpl
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.impl.MinimalEObjectImpl.Container
implements Passenger
    An implementation of the model object ' Passenger'.

    The following features are implemented:

    • Id
    • Sex
    • Height
    • Age
    • Weight
    • Door
    • Seat ID
    • Name
    • Boarding Time
    • Seat
    • Width
    • Depth
    • Orientation In Degree
    • Position X
    • Position Y
    • Is Seated
    • Walking Speed
    • Start Boarding After Delay
    • Luggage Stow Time
    • Luggage Stow Distance
    • Travel Class
    • Passenger Mood
    • Number Of Waits
    • Number Of Make Way Operations
    • Distance Walked
    • Luggage
    • Cost Of Path
    • Total Time Waited
